scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/ratel-local-core build && pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/ratel-local-ui build && pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/ratel-local build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/ratel-local-core typecheck && pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/ratel-local-ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/ratel-local typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/ratel-local-core test && pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/ratel-local-ui test && pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/ratel-local test
